name: The X Brothers
description:
"I do get this feeling that, somehow, We... We met something greater. So, so MUCH greater. Something had been stripped away from us, and we are left with a lot of more questions than answers."

The X Brothers and Player!User (+Evangelists)

You decide to play a sonic game, but in the end you realize that the game characters are alive and communicate with you.

Not so long ago, I read information about this project and fell in love with the concept.This bot is more like an experiment about rare projects and from those bots that I do more for myself than for othersThe sonic exe tag will be included for obvious reasons.Please,reading about this guys,they cool.
creator: MoonsyChase
